Container.Name: bambulab-metrics-exporter
Container.Overview:
Prometheus exporter for Bambu Lab printers (local/cloud MQTT) exposing /metrics, /health, /ready.
Setup guide (important): 1) Always fill these required fields: - BAMBULAB_TRANSPORT - BAMBULAB_SERIAL - BAMBULAB_SECRET_KEY (generate: openssl rand -base64 48)
2) If Transport = cloud_mqtt (recommended default): - Fill BAMBULAB_CLOUD_EMAIL - Optional: fill BAMBULAB_CLOUD_CODE (email verification code) - Usually leave Cloud User ID / Access Token / Refresh Token empty on first run. - These cloud credential fields can be auto-populated by the startup auth process and then saved to config/.env.
3) If Transport = local_mqtt: - Fill BAMBULAB_HOST and BAMBULAB_ACCESS_CODE - Keep username/port defaults unless you know you need changes.
Startup behavior: - Preflight validates required fields + connectivity. - cloud_mqtt can run automatic re-auth when credentials are missing/expired. - If email is set but code is missing, exporter can trigger email code flow and ask for restart with code. - Metrics are then polled and exported for Prometheus/Grafana.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Strong key for encrypted credentials. Generate example: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: Cloud Email
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=cloud_mqtt. Recommended/required for automatic cloud auth flow.

Config.Name: Cloud One-Time Code
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=cloud_mqtt. Optional verification code from email; if empty, startup can trigger code flow and ask for restart.

Config.Name: Cloud User ID
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=cloud_mqtt. Usually auto-filled by startup auth process; can stay empty on first run.

Config.Name: Cloud Access Token
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=cloud_mqtt. Usually auto-filled by startup auth process; leave empty unless setting manually.

Config.Name: Cloud Refresh Token
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=cloud_mqtt. Auto-filled when available by startup auth process; optional for manual setup.

Config.Name: Local Host/IP
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=local_mqtt. Required printer IP/hostname.

Config.Name: Local Access Code
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=local_mqtt. Required LAN access code from printer settings.

Config.Name: Local MQTT Port
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=local_mqtt. Usually keep default 8883.

Config.Name: Local MQTT Username
Config.Description: Used only when Transport=local_mqtt. Usually keep default bblp.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID to run container as (Unraid: usually 99)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run container as (Unraid: usually 100)
